title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: An AWS Developers educational video introducing Infrastructure as Code fundamentals through a hands-on project. It demonstrates building a serverless REST API using AWS CDK with Python, comparing manual AWS console setup against infrastructure-as-code automation, and covering Lambda, DynamoDB, and API Gateway.
